name: pool
description: /pool <args> — wraps the `pool` CLI (host roster + remote exec — minimal, zero deps). Verbs: list · add <host> · on <host> <cmd> · status · install tailscale · rm <host>. NL trigger via skill ('pool 호스트', '다른 호스트에서 돌려', 'remote exec'). Pairs with commons.tape g9 + sidecar's pool-route hook.
